objective: Move explicit trace/status evidence-source requirements closer to the first subagent packet example so agents do not miss source and compact artifact requirements when copying the packet.

excluded: files and systems outside the declared allowed files

packets.objective: Subagent protocol packet section directly tells agents that trace/status evidence commands need explicit source and json output, while docs validation and strict orchestration evidence pass.

budgets.context: Bounded to taskboard, docs, task, workflow, and evidence files.
budgets.validation: Focused tests plus taskboard validation and strict status evidence.

integration.policy: Lead integrates subagent findings, updates packet statuses before closeout, and keeps manifest refs tied to the machine evidence artifact.
